title: NY judge finds Trump in contempt of a gag order. What's the penalty?
shortDescription: The former president's incendiary posts on social media cost him $9000 for violating a gag order.

title: Judge rules Trump violated gag order nine times
shortDescription: Donald Trump will be fined $1,000 for each violation after Judge Juan Merchan determined he violated a gag order nine times in his hush money trial.

title: What if Trump loses in 2024? 5 takeaways from his TIME interview
shortDescription: In a new wide-ranging interview, Donald Trump said he wants to pursue a gristly conservative agenda.

title: White House denounces takeover of Columbia University building
shortDescription: The White House condemned the takeover of a Columbia University academic building by Pro-Palestinian protesters and the use of the term "intifada."

title: Trump fined $9,000, threatened with jail over gag order violations
shortDescription: Donald Trump violated his gag order 9 times with posts online and on Truth Social, Judge Juan Merchan decided during the hush money trial.

title: Trump leads Biden in seven key swing states, a new poll shows
shortDescription: President Joe Biden is trailing former President Donald Trump in seven key swing states, according to a new poll.

title: House Dems say they'll give Speaker Johnson a lifeline from ouster
shortDescription: Rep. Marjorie Taylor Greene has made a motion to oust Johnson from his leadership position.

title: Who is Trump's lawyer Todd Blanche?
shortDescription: Todd Blanche, a former prosecutor turned defense attorney, is representing former President Donald Trump in his New York hush money trial.

title: Gaetz draws GOP challenger for Florida's August primary
shortDescription: Florida representative gets a last-minute opponent in Republican primary

title: Day 9 at Trump trial: Lawyer talks National Enquirer hush money deal
shortDescription: An attorney representing former Playboy model Karen McDougal said Trump should 'throw in an ambassadorship for me.'

title: Trump says crime is out of control, but data shows steep decline
shortDescription: FBI data shows violent crime has been dropping in recent years after a spike in 2020, but Trump says crime is still 'out of control.'

title: Donald Trump and Joe Biden are 'darn near even' in 2024. Here's why.
shortDescription: Trump is staying afloat - despite problems that would have destroyed other candidates - because voters have issues with Biden and the economy.

title: Image of Michelle Obama wearing anti-Trump shirt is edited | Fact check
shortDescription: Obama's shirt is digitally altered in the image. The original photo shows the former first lady wearing merchandise for her book.

title: No, Brookings didn't attribute 70% of COVID-19 deaths to Trump | Fact check
shortDescription: A spokesperson for the Brookings Institution said she was not aware of such an estimate from the organization.

title: Wisconsin GOP launches training for challenges to voting processes
shortDescription: The party's rhetoric surrounding the plans indicates its roots are in former President Donald Trump's distortions of the 2020 election outcome.

title: Who will be Donald Trump’s choice for VP?
shortDescription: Who's in and who's out? A dozen candidates are on the shortlist as possible contenders to be the former president's running mate in 2024.
